case_title: JESUS RODRIGUEZ VS. BRYAN J. VALVERDE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT BRYAN J. VALVERDE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, JESUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYAN J. VALVERDE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $20,084.91 PRINCIPAL, $93.34 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,548.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
